Ingest one concrete record class

Source: R/ingest.R
kg_write.Rd

kg_write() is a convenience wrapper around the atomic kg_ingest() contract.

Usage

kg_write(store, batch, class, records, mode = "upsert", validate = "fast")

Arguments

store

An initialized, writable kg_store.

batch

A kg_batch() object.

class

One concrete class name.

records

A data frame for class.

mode, validate

Passed to kg_ingest().

Value

A kg_ingest_result.

On this page

Developed by James.

Source and issues are available on GitHub. Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
